title: IteamsAdderUploadPlus
description: Easiest way to upload your ItemsAdder files. Support 1.13-1.21.x
body:
# About

![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0a61bcc390ca9ae8b27f50b64a600a6422aa5200.png)

**IteamsAdderUploadPlus**(also IAUP) is an all-in-one plugin that can simply upload IteamsAdder's resourcepack(s) to remote server and modify the configs.
Flexible configuration allows you to make plugins work the way you want them to. The default configuration already contains useful values that can help you better understand and get started quickly.

Current supported platforms:

- Paper/Spigot API (Minecraft versions 1.13-1.21.7)

# Install
Just download the `.jar` file and upload it to your `plugins` folder

Then **restart** your Minecraft server.

# Requirement
- IteamsAdder Plugin _(Paid but not included)_
- Minecraft server's version is between 1.20.6 and 1.21.7

# Support
Due to time constraints, my support is currently very limited. You can contact me by email: `im@932.moe`
